Remarks: Repeat two times for recording in nature once shouted. This mountain-forest with sufficient gradient slopes and well-defined gullies cut through the slopes. They are an excellent natural vegetation, where, in particular, are found and paradise flycatchers. A more gentle slopes converted to plantations of coconut palms, shrubs often. Owl I have not seen, and no wonder - a continuous carpet of undergrowth. However, as I understand on Burma for the Malayan Owl it is quite appropriate - in places I did a couple of times and met. ...
